creator: jimmiejaz@gmail.com
text:
Selecting DEMOSAIC_PACK_GPL2 or DEMOSAIC_PACK_GPL3 fails to fetch the distfile.

=> LibRaw-0.13.7.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.libraw.su/data/LibRaw-0.13.7.tar.gz
fetch: http://www.libraw.su/data/LibRaw-0.13.7.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/LibRaw-0.13.7.tar.gz
LibRaw-0.13.7.tar.gz                          100% of 1317 kB  371 kBps
=> LibRaw-demosaic-pack-GPL2-0.13.7.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.libraw.su/data/LibRaw-demosaic-pack-GPL2-0.13.7.tar.gz
fetch: http://www.libraw.su/data/LibRaw-demosaic-pack-GPL2-0.13.7.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/LibRaw-demosaic-pack-GPL2-0.13.7.tar.gz
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/LibRaw-demosaic-pack-GPL2-0.13.7.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: Try to pull the distfile.
